query:
UPDATE conversations
        SET metadata = jsonb_set(
                COALESCE(metadata, '{}'::jsonb),
                '{consumed_at}',
                to_jsonb(NOW()::text)
            ),
            updated_at = NOW()
        WHERE thread_id = $1
          AND message_type = 'task_subscription_notification'
          AND COALESCE(metadata->>'consumed_at', '') = ''
